items.text: Company profile – Group structure, parent/subsidiary companies, registered office & branches, business information, memberships, accreditations & certifications (QCI, ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, 17025)
List of prestigious clients & projects (previous & ongoing), testimonials / references / letters of completion
Human resources – Organization chart, departments, communication matrix & key personnel contact details (corporate & regional level)
Statutory compliance – Company registration, Udyam, environmental clearance, NOC, licenses, permits, municipal clearance, GST/PF/ESI/PAN
Operational capability – Management structure, project management, supply chain, approved vendors / suppliers
Technical criteria – Staff qualifications, equipment & technology
Financial criteria – Turnover, net worth, liquidity ratio, financial statements, credit rating & insurance coverage
Logistics plan – List of vehicles, transport & delivery facilities & capacities
Quality assurance & control – Procedure / plan, quality policy & objectives
Health & safety plan – HS policy & objectives
Any other documents, references / photographs

Supplier: Registered / Unregistered Company
Supplier: Company licence / GST registration
Quarry: Licensed or not
Permits from Ministries / Departments / Local Administration
Area & quantity / volume allowed to quarry by departments
Infrastructure – Internal & external access roads, distance from site / route map
Logistics – Vehicles, heavy earth-moving machineries & equipment
Initial tests conducted by company / quarry
3rd party samples collected at various depths & locations
Visual observation of raw material quality
Consistency / variation of raw material throughout the quarry
Possibility of contamination – Vegetation, organic materials, oil / hazardous chemical spillage
Overburden removal prior to loading
Dumps & stockpiles locations
Supply risk / possibility of interruptions
Other, if any
